item.name: Mythril Boxfish
item.description:
Valued more for its boxlike remains than for its meat, which is astonishingly mediocre.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The metallic sheen of this fish's scales has been intensified by an inundation of aether. Fisherfolk will sometimes fashion its remains into a box in truth, the containers favored for carrying hooks, pretty seashells, and other such valuables.
